(1) इस योजना को कम चारी िन'ेप सहब+ बीमा (संशोधन) योजना, 2016 कहा जाएगा । (2) यह सरकारी राजप7 म, काशन क ितिथ से भावी होगी । 2. कम चारी िन'ेप सहब+ बीमा योजना, 1976 म,, पैरा9ाफ 22 (1) उप-पैरा (3) म, ख;ड 1 म, िन=निलिखत ित>थािपत कया जाएगा अथा त्:- "(1) िजस माह म, सद>य क मृ$यु ई, उसके पूव  12 माह क अविध के दौरान िलया गया औसत मािसक वेतन (अिधकतम पं#ह हजार Hपए तक) के तीस गुणा के साथ-साथ िनिध म, मृतक के खाते के औसत शेष तथा अिधिनयम क धारा 17 के अंतग त छूट ाLत भिवय िनिध अथवा कम चारी भिवय िनिध योजना 1952 के पैरा 27 अथवा 27ए के अंतग त औसत शेष का 50 ितशत जैसी भी ि>थित हो, िपछले 12 माह अथवा उसक सद>यता क अविध के दौरान, जो भी कम हो एक लाख एवं 50 हजार Hपए क सीमा तक, अिधकतम छ: लाख Hपए क सीमा तक" (2) उप पैरा9ाफ (4) म, अंक, कोठक एवं शSद "उप-पैरा9ाफ (1), (2) अथवा (3)," को अंक, कोठक एवं शSद "उप- पैरा9ाफ (1) अथवा (2)" से ित>थािपत कया जाएगा । [ सं. एस-65013/2/2015-एस.एस.-II ] मनीष कुमार गुUा, संयु सिचव टपणी: टपणी: टपणी: टपणी: मूल योजना भारत के राजप7 असाधारण, भाग II, ख;ड 3, उप ख;ड (i) म, संWया सा.का.िन. 488(अ), दनांक 28 जुलाई, 1976 म, कािशत क गई थी तथा अंितम बार इसम, संWया सा.का.िन. 527(अ), दनांक 02 जुलाई, 2015 ारा संशोधन कया गया था। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th May, 2016 G.S.R. 543 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 6C read with sub-section (1) of section 7 of the Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 (19 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following scheme further to amend the Employees’ Deposit-Linked Insurance Scheme, 1976, namely:- 1. (1) This Scheme may be called the Employees' Deposit-Linked Insurance (Amendment) Scheme, 2016. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Employees' Deposit Linked Insurance Scheme, 1976, in paragraph 22,- (1) in sub-paragraph (3), for clause (i), the following shall be substituted, namely : – “(i) the average monthly wages drawn (subject to a maximum of fifteen thousand rupees), during the twelve months preceding the month in which he died, multiplied by thirty times plus fifty per cent. of the average balance in the account of the deceased in the Fund or of a provident fund exempted under section 17 of the Act or under paragraph 27 or 27 A of the Employees’ Provident Funds Scheme, 1952, as the case may be, during preceding twelve months or during the period of his membership, whichever is less, subject to a ceiling of one lakh and fifty thousand rupees, subject to a total ceiling of six lakh rupees;”; (2) in sub-paragraph (4), for the words, brackets and figures “sub-paragraph (1), (2) or (3)”, the words, brackets and figures “sub-paragraph (1) or (2)”, shall be substituted. [No. S-65013/2/2015-SS-II] MANISH GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Note.- The principal scheme was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 488(E), dated the 28th July, 1976 and lastly amended vide number G.S.R. 527(E), dated the 2nd July, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
